screen_metadata.name: Operational Timesheet Ledger & Milestone Billing Console

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px corporate audit and billing tracking canvas)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Split Console (Left Main Column: Split view featuring top operational employee timesheet approval lists and bottom chronological time logging spreadsheets; Right Column Sidebar Panel: Contract Milestone Billing Center and conditional validation rule checkers; Top Metric Strip: Project budget burn-rates counters, logged billable hours, and deferred revenue projections parameters)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains double-pane spreadsheet and milestone checklist tracking grids side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Timesheet approval logs fold into a top accordion section to provide optimal data row spacing for the main ledger grid lists)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active project director or financial controller authentication tokens -> Inherit multi-tenant global isolation parameters -> Execute state payload fetch from ProjectService.getTimesheetLedger()
user_progression_routes.on_timesheet_row_select: Hydrate contract_milestone_billing_hub elements dynamically with corresponding budget cap margins formulas analytics and customer information parameters

redirection_rules.condition: If a submitted billable hour row item duration value violates contract variance limits thresholds (> 12.0 Hours per developer per calendar day baseline block constraints)
redirection_rules.action: Flag target row block layout parameters style context inline as 'Suspended - Variance Audit Breach' and completely isolate the item from being aggregated into downstream milestone revenue dispatches

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action command button link element 'btn_dispatch_milestone_billing'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog validation wizard modal requesting transaction signing parameters before broadcasting milestone completion packets out to the event streaming mesh

atoms.type: Tabular Numeric Entry Input Component Box
Functional Core Action Core Button Element

props.variant: Primary Revenue Success Blue Green Accent

molecules.composition: Combines developer profile identity badge + assigned WBS task identifier code + logged hours total summary label + interactive single-click accept / reject action toolbar button icons
Combines checklist status marker check icon + milestone description row text string + target release valuation block + conditional lifecycle state token pill badge component

organisms.composition: Virtualized column tracking layout grid parsing extensive historical billable records arrays featuring text keyword searching parameters filters, export utilities commands, and active row index selection modifiers arrays.

Interactive vertical stack panel tracking fixed project milestones loops grouping multiple contract_milestone_milestone_item molecules instances, calculated cap limits meters, and target dispatch submission triggers hooks.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced spacing formats stack applied strictly across hour summaries and monetary numbers rows grids fields to guarantee column alignments rules limits)

scales.burn_rate_giant_numerical: font-size: 1.75rem (28px) | font-weight: 800 | letter-spacing: tight tracking mono-numerals configuration
